---
title: \{SET\}
subtitle: Communication
author: Kyle P Messier
date:  "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    lightbox: true
    gallery: false
    highlight: tango
    toc: 1
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---




## Collaboration and Communication

Collaboration and effective communication are crucial in research. Follow these guidelines to facilitate collaboration within the group:

1. Use version control systems: Collaborate on projects using version control systems like Git. It allows multiple researchers to work on the same project simultaneously and tracks changes efficiently.

2. Share code and documentation: Make your code and analysis scripts accessible to others. Document your work thoroughly
